FunRounds_NoPermission.en-US: {{green}}[FunRounds]{{default}} You do not have permission to use this command.

FunRounds_Stopped.en-US: {{green}}[FunRounds]{{default}} Fun round stopped — normal play resumes next round.

FunRounds_UnknownRound.en-US: {{green}}[FunRounds]{{default}} Unknown round '{{red}}{0}{{default}}'. Use !funrounds to list registered rounds.
